basic_details.job_title: NFDC Festival Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Film Development Corporation of India (NFDC)
basic_details.short_information: National Film Development Corporation of India (NFDC) has released the official Festival Coordinator Recruitment 2026 notification on the official website. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced under the NFDC Festival Coordinator Recruitment 2026 for contractual engagement.

application_fee.all_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Event Management, Cinema Studies, Film Making, Communications, or a related field.
qualification.details: Festival Coordinator: Bachelor's degree in Event Management, Cinema Studies, Film Making, Communications, or a related field. Minimum 3 years work experience. Familiarity with films, audio-visual and other arts, film festivals and the entertainment industry. Experience in event coordination, festival management, or arts administration preferred. Strong organizational and multitasking skills with keen attention to detail. Excellent interpersonal and communication skills. Ability to work under pressure and adapt to changing situations. Capability to deal with film, industry, artistes, cineastes and other diverse sections of festival stakeholders including audience. Proficiency in Microsoft Office, Programming, event management and other relevant software. Availability to work evenings and weekends before and during the festival period. Candidates with own Laptops will be preferred.

salary_details.details: Consolidated pay of Rs. 50,000/- per month.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NFDC Festival Coordinator Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NFDC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.national_film_development_corporation_of: Bachelor's degree in Event Management, Cinema Studies, Film Making, Communications, or a related field.

content_sections.heading: NFDC Festival Coordinator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NFDC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NFDC Festival Coordinator Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NFDC Festival Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
NFDC Festival Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Festival Coordinator: Bachelor's degree in Event Management, Cinema Studies, Film Making, Communications, or a related field. Minimum 3 years work experience. Familiarity with films, audio-visual and other arts, film festivals and the entertainment industry. Experience in event coordination, festival management, or arts administration preferred. Strong organizational and multitasking skills with keen attention to detail. Excellent interpersonal and communication skills. Ability to work under pressure and adapt to changing situations. Capability to deal with film, industry, artistes, cineastes and other diverse sections of festival stakeholders including audience. Proficiency in Microsoft Office, Programming, event management and other relevant software. Availability to work evenings and weekends before and during the festival period. Candidates with own Laptops will be preferred.

content_sections.heading: NFDC Festival Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

rows.fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: NFDC Festival Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
NFDC Festival Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Consolidated pay of Rs. 50,000/- per month.

content_sections.heading: NFDC Festival Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NFDC Festival Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NFDC Festival Coordinator Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NFDC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NFDC Festival Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NFDC Festival Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Festival Coordinator position is 31st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Festival Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Festival Coordinator post announced by NFDC.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Festival Coordinator role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Event Management, Cinema Studies, Film Making, Communications, or a related field.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Festival Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Festival Coordinator post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Festival Coordinator post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated pay of Rs. 50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official NFDC LinkedIn Portal.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any work experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 3 years of relevant work experience is required, with preference for experience in event coordination or festival management.

faq.question: Q8. What are the preferred skills for the FESTIVAL COORDINATOR role?
faq.answer: Strong organizational skills, multitasking abilities, keen attention to detail, and excellent communication skills are preferred.

faq.question: Q9. Will candidates with their own laptops be preferred?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates who own laptops will be preferred for this position.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The FESTIVAL COORDINATOR position is on a contract basis.
